# anthropic_spend_limit (Resource)

Manages a PER-USER spend limit override. The Admin API only accepts `scope.type=user` for writes — seat-tier, rbac_group, organization_service, and organization-level limits are configured in claude.ai and surface here read-only via `anthropic_effective_spend_limits`. Amount is a decimal string in minor units (e.g. "12345" = $123.45 USD).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "anthropic_spend_limit" "alice_monthly" {
  user_id = "user_01WCz1FkmYMm4gnmykNKUu3Q"
  amount  = "10000" # $100.00 in minor units
  period  = "monthly"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `amount` (String) Non-negative integer decimal string in minor currency units (cents for USD).
- `user_id` (String) User ID this limit applies to. Changing forces replacement (the upsert key is (scope, period)).

### Optional

- `period` (String) Billing period for this limit. Changing forces replacement.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `currency` (String) Currency for the amount. Typically `USD`.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `scope_type` (String) Always `user` for limits managed by this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
